title: Casablanca
overview: A cynical nightclub owner in wartime Morocco must choose between love and the resistance when an old flame walks back into his life.

title: Seven Samurai
overview: A poor farming village hires seven masterless samurai to defend it against marauding bandits.

title: 12 Angry Men
overview: A lone juror pushes eleven others to reexamine the evidence in a seemingly open-and-shut murder trial.

title: Some Like It Hot
overview: Two musicians witness a mob hit and go on the run disguised as members of an all-women band.

title: Psycho
overview: A woman on the run checks into a remote motel run by a troubled young man and his domineering mother.

title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly
overview: Three gunslingers race and betray one another across the Civil-War West in search of buried gold.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
overview: From prehistoric dawn to deep space, humanity's evolution is guided by a mysterious black monolith.

title: The Godfather
overview: The aging patriarch of a crime dynasty hands control of his empire to his reluctant youngest son.

title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
overview: King Arthur and his knights embark on an absurd, low-budget quest for the Holy Grail.

title: Jaws
overview: A police chief, a marine biologist, and a grizzled fisherman hunt a great white shark terrorizing a beach town.

title: Star Wars
overview: A farm boy joins a band of rebels to rescue a princess and topple a galaxy-spanning empire.

title: Alien
overview: The crew of a commercial spaceship is hunted one by one by a lethal creature they unknowingly brought aboard.

title: Apocalypse Now
overview: A war-weary captain journeys upriver during the Vietnam War to assassinate a renegade colonel.

title: The Shining
overview: A writer takes a winter caretaker job at an isolated hotel, where supernatural forces unravel his sanity.

title: E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial
overview: A lonely boy befriends a stranded alien and helps it find a way back home.

title: Blade Runner
overview: A weary detective hunts fugitive bio-engineered humans through a rain-soaked future Los Angeles.

title: Ghostbusters
overview: Three eccentric scientists start a ghost-catching business just as New York faces a supernatural threat.

title: Back to the Future
overview: A teenager is accidentally sent thirty years into the past in a time-traveling sports car.

title: The Princess Bride
overview: A grandfather reads his grandson a swashbuckling fairy tale of true love, giants, and revenge.

title: Die Hard
overview: An off-duty cop battles a team of thieves who seize a Los Angeles skyscraper during a holiday party.

title: Goodfellas
overview: A young man rises and falls through decades of life inside a New York mafia crew.

title: Unforgiven
overview: A retired outlaw takes one last bounty job that forces him to confront his violent past.

title: Jurassic Park
overview: A theme park of cloned dinosaurs descends into chaos when its containment systems fail.

title: Schindler's List
overview: A German industrialist saves more than a thousand Jewish refugees by employing them in his factories.

title: Pulp Fiction
overview: The lives of two hitmen, a boxer, and a gangster's wife interweave across several darkly comic tales.

title: Forrest Gump
overview: A kind-hearted man with a simple outlook unwittingly influences decades of American history.

title: The Lion King
overview: A young lion prince flees his kingdom after his father's death, then returns to reclaim his place.

title: Se7en
overview: Two detectives track a serial killer who stages his murders around the seven deadly sins.

title: Toy Story
overview: A cowboy toy grows jealous when a flashy space-ranger figure becomes his owner's new favorite.

title: Fargo
overview: A bungled kidnapping scheme in snowbound Minnesota is unraveled by a pregnant police chief.

title: Titanic
overview: Two young lovers from different classes meet aboard the doomed ocean liner on its maiden voyage.

title: The Matrix
overview: A hacker discovers reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion against the machines that built it.

title: Gladiator
overview: A betrayed Roman general is enslaved and fights his way back through the arena to avenge his family.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring
overview: A hobbit and eight companions set out to destroy a powerful ring before a dark lord can claim it.

title: Spirited Away
overview: A young girl must work in a spirit-world bathhouse to free her parents from a witch's curse.

title: Finding Nemo
overview: A timid clownfish crosses the ocean to rescue his son, who has been scooped up by a diver.

title: March of the Penguins
overview: A documentary following emperor penguins on their grueling annual march to breed in the Antarctic.

title: The Departed
overview: An undercover cop and a mole inside the police race to expose each other within a Boston crime war.

title: No Country for Old Men
overview: A hunter who stumbles on drug-deal cash is pursued by a relentless killer across the Texas borderlands.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: A masked vigilante and an anarchic criminal push a city to the brink in a battle for its soul.

title: WALL-E
overview: A lonely trash-compacting robot on an abandoned Earth follows a sleek probe into space and finds love.

title: Inception
overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing is hired to plant an idea instead.

title: Interstellar
overview: A former pilot leads a mission through a wormhole to find humanity a new home among the stars.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
overview: A legendary concierge and his young protégé become entangled in a theft and a family fortune.

title: Whiplash
overview: An ambitious drummer is pushed to his limits by an abusive music instructor chasing greatness.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
overview: On a desert planet of tyrants, a drifter and a rebel commander flee across the wasteland in a war rig.

title: La La Land
overview: A jazz pianist and an aspiring actress fall in love while chasing their dreams in Los Angeles.

title: Coco
overview: A boy who dreams of music journeys into the Land of the Dead to uncover his family's history.

title: Get Out
overview: A young man's weekend with his girlfriend's family turns into an escalating waking nightmare.

title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
overview: A teenager gains spider powers and teams with heroes from parallel dimensions to save the multiverse.

title: Parasite
overview: A poor family schemes its way into the household of a wealthy one, with unexpected consequences.

title: Dune
overview: A young heir travels to a deadly desert planet that holds the key to his family's and his people's future.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
overview: A spell to restore his secret identity tears open the multiverse and unleashes old foes.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
overview: A harried laundromat owner discovers she must connect with parallel versions of herself to save reality.

title: Top Gun: Maverick
overview: A veteran fighter pilot trains a new generation of aviators for a near-impossible mission.

title: Oppenheimer
overview: The physicist who led the creation of the atomic bomb reckons with the weapon he brought into the world.
